content:
"
chrono = { version = "0.4", features = ["serde"] }
tokio-stream = "0.1"
rand = "0.8"
rust-embed = { version = "8", features = ["interpolate-folder-path"] }
mime_guess = "2"
notify.workspace = true
async-stream = "0.3"
futures-core = "0.3"
arc-swap = "1"

[dev-dependencies]
tempfile = "3"
toml = "0.8"
tower = { version = "0.5", features = ["util"] }
http-body-util = "0.1"
